L271188L271190L271191L271192
let K, add, mul, n; assume hn; let A; assume hA, hRing;
L271193L271194
have h_s24_t2_core_ring: \(({K},{add},{mul})\text{ is a ring}\) by hRing;
formal
statement: ring K add mul;
proof term: exact (andEL (ring K add mul) (commutative_on K mul) hRing);
L271195
have h_s24_t2_skip_index_in: \(\forall a\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{\lambda k\in n,\;[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{a}\}}} \in {{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}^{{n}}}\);
proof from hn (3 steps)
statement: ∀a ∈ ordsucc n, (λk ∈ n ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n a k) ∈ (ordsucc n)n;
L271197L271198
let a; assume ha;
L271199
thus thesis by if_member_by_cases from hn;
formal
exact (lam_Pi n (λk ⇒ ordsucc n) (λk ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n a k) (λk hk ⇒ mem_eq_substL (ordsucc n) (if k ∈ a then k else ordsucc k) (skip_ordinal_index n a k) (If_i_1 (k ∈ n) (if k ∈ a then k else ordsucc k) 0 hk) (god1_if_member_by_cases (ordsucc n) (k ∈ a) k (ordsucc k) (λ_ ⇒ ordsuccI1 n k hk) (λ_ ⇒ nat_ordsucc_in_ordsucc n (omega_nat_p n hn) k hk))));
end;
L271209
have h_s24_t2_skip_index_eval: \(\forall a\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\forall k\in n,\;{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{a}\}}} = {\operatorname{if}\;{k} \in {a}\;\operatorname{then}\;k\;\operatorname{else}\;{k} \cup \{{k}\}}\);
proof (5 steps)
statement: ∀a ∈ ordsucc n, ∀k ∈ n, skip_ordinal_index n a k = if k ∈ a then k else ordsucc k;
L271212L271213L271214L271215
let a; assume ha; let k; assume hk;
L271216
thus thesis by simplification from hk;
formal
exact (If_i_1 (k ∈ n) (if k ∈ a then k else ordsucc k) 0 hk);
end;
L271217
have h_s24_t2_skip_index_avoids: \(\forall a\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\forall k\in n,\;{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{a}\}}} \neq {a}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_skip_index_eval (19 steps)
L271219L271220L271221L271222
let a; assume ha; let k; assume hk;
L271223
have hIfIn: \({k} \in {a} \to {[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{a}\}}} \neq {a}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_skip_index_eval, ha, hk (6 steps)
L271224
assume hka, hSkipA;
L271225L271226
have hSkipK: \({[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{a}\}}} = {k}\) by transitivity from h_s24_t2_skip_index_eval, ha, hk, hka;
formal
statement: skip_ordinal_index n a k = k;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (skip_ordinal_index n a k) (if k ∈ a then k else ordsucc k) k (h_s24_t2_skip_index_eval a ha k hk) (If_i_1 (k ∈ a) k (ordsucc k) hka));
L271231L271232
have hkEqA: \({k} = {a}\) by transitivity from hSkipK, hSkipA;
formal
statement: k = a;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra k (skip_ordinal_index n a k) a (eq_sym (skip_ordinal_index n a k) k hSkipK) hSkipA);
L271234
thus thesis by In_irref from hkEqA, hka;
formal
exact (In_irref k (mem_eq_set_subst a k k (eq_sym k a hkEqA) hka));
end;
L271236
have hIfNotIn: \({k} \notin {a} \to {[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{a}\}}} \neq {a}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_skip_index_eval, ha, hk (6 steps)
L271237
assume hka, hSkipA;
L271238L271239
have hSkipSucc: \({[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{a}\}}} = {{k} \cup \{{k}\}}\) by transitivity from h_s24_t2_skip_index_eval, ha, hk, hka;
formal
statement: skip_ordinal_index n a k = ordsucc k;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (skip_ordinal_index n a k) (if k ∈ a then k else ordsucc k) (ordsucc k) (h_s24_t2_skip_index_eval a ha k hk) (If_i_0 (k ∈ a) k (ordsucc k) hka));
L271244L271245
have hSuccEqA: \({{k} \cup \{{k}\}} = {a}\) by transitivity from hSkipSucc, hSkipA;
formal
statement: ordsucc k = a;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (ordsucc k) (skip_ordinal_index n a k) a (eq_sym (skip_ordinal_index n a k) (ordsucc k) hSkipSucc) hSkipA);
L271247
thus thesis by hka from hSuccEqA;
formal
exact (hka (mem_eq_set_subst (ordsucc k) a k hSuccEqA (ordsuccI2 k)));
end;
L271249
thus thesis by orE from hIfIn, hIfNotIn;
formal
exact (orE (k ∈ a) (k ∉ a) (xm (k ∈ a)) (skip_ordinal_index n a k ≠ a) hIfIn hIfNotIn);
end;
L271251
have h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in: \(\forall B\in M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K}),\;\forall r,c\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{{B}_{{r}{c}}} \in {M_{{n}}({K})}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_skip_index_in (11 steps)
statement: ∀B ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n), ∀r c ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_minor n r c B ∈ square_matrix_ring K n;
L271254L271255L271256L271257L271258L271259
let B; assume hB; let r; assume hr; let c; assume hc;
L271260L271262
have hRows: \({\lambda k\in n,\;[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}} \in {{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}^{{n}}}\) by h_s24_t2_skip_index_in from hr;
L271263L271265
have hCols: \({\lambda k\in n,\;[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{c}\}}} \in {{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}^{{n}}}\) by h_s24_t2_skip_index_in from hc;
L271266
thus thesis by lam_Pi from hB, hRows, hCols;
formal
exact (lam_Pi (n ⨯ n) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ matrix_entry B (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1))) (λu hu ⇒ ap_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λw ⇒ K) B (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0),skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) hB (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (mem_eq_substR (ordsucc n) ((λk ∈ n ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n r k) (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (beta n (λk ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n r k) (u 0) (andEL (u 0 ∈ n) (u 1 ∈ n) (setprod_elim_0_1 n n u hu))) (ap_Pi n (λk ⇒ ordsucc n) (λk ∈ n ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n r k) (u 0) hRows (andEL (u 0 ∈ n) (u 1 ∈ n) (setprod_elim_0_1 n n u hu)))) (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (mem_eq_substR (ordsucc n) ((λk ∈ n ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n c k) (u 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (beta n (λk ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n c k) (u 1) (andER (u 0 ∈ n) (u 1 ∈ n) (setprod_elim_0_1 n n u hu))) (ap_Pi n (λk ⇒ ordsucc n) (λk ∈ n ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n c k) (u 1) hCols (andER (u 0 ∈ n) (u 1 ∈ n) (setprod_elim_0_1 n n u hu)))))));
end;
L271300L271301
have h_s24_t2_one_in: \({1_{{K}}} \in {K}\) by ring_multiplicative_identity_specification from h_s24_t2_core_ring;
formal
statement: ring_one K mul ∈ K;
proof term: exact (andEL (ring_one K mul ∈ K) (∀value ∈ K, mul value (ring_one K mul) = value ∧ mul (ring_one K mul) value = value) (god1_ring_multiplicative_identity_specification K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring));
L271308
have h_s24_t2_sign_in: \(\forall q,\;{(-1)^{{q}}} \in {K}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_one_in, h_s24_t2_core_ring (2 steps)
L271310
let q;
L271311
thus thesis by group_inverse_in from h_s24_t2_one_in, h_s24_t2_core_ring;
formal
exact (orE (∃h ∈ ω, q = 2 * h) (¬ ∃h ∈ ω, q = 2 * h) (xm (∃h ∈ ω, q = 2 * h)) (cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul q ∈ K) (λheven ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (ring_one K mul) (cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul q) (If_i_1 (∃h ∈ ω, q = 2 * h) (ring_one K mul) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) heven) h_s24_t2_one_in) (λhodd ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) (cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul q) (If_i_0 (∃h ∈ ω, q = 2 * h) (ring_one K mul) (ring_negation K add (ring_one K mul)) hodd) (god1_group_inverse_in K add (god1_ring_additive_group K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring) (ring_one K mul) h_s24_t2_one_in)));
end;
L271329
have h_s24_t2_cofactor_in: \(\forall B\in M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K}),\;\forall r,c\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{(-1)^{{r}+{c}}\det({B}_{{r}{c}})} \in {K}\);

statement: ∀B ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n), ∀r c ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_cofactor K add mul n r c B ∈ K;
L271332L271333L271334L271335L271336L271337
let B; assume hB; let r; assume hr; let c; assume hc;
L271338
thus thesis by ring_multiplicative_law from h_s24_t2_core_ring, h_s24_t2_sign_in, hn, h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in, hB, hr, hc, hRing;
formal
exact (god1_ring_multiplicative_law K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring (cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul (r + c)) (h_s24_t2_sign_in (r + c)) (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n r c B)) (god1_matrix_determinant_in K add mul n hn (matrix_minor n r c B) (h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in B hB r hr c hc) hRing));
end;
L271345
have h_s24_t2_adjugate_entry: \(\forall r,c\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{{\widetilde{{A}}}_{{r},{c}}} = {(-1)^{{c}+{r}}\det({A}_{{c}{r}})}\);
proof (7 steps)
statement: ∀r c ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) r c = matrix_cofactor K add mul n c r A;
L271348L271349L271350L271351
let r; assume hr; let c; assume hc;
L271352L271353
have hrc: \({\left(r,c\right)} \in {{{n} \cup \{{n}\}} \times {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}\) by tuple_2_setprod from hr, hc;
formal
statement: (r,c) ∈ ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) r hr c hc);
L271354
thus thesis by transitivity using binary_operation_congruence from hrc;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) r c) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n ((r,c) 1) ((r,c) 0) A) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n c r A) (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ matrix_cofactor K add mul n (u 1) (u 0) A) (r,c) hrc) (god1_binary_operation_congruence (λx y ⇒ matrix_cofactor K add mul n x y A) ((r,c) 1) c ((r,c) 0) r (tuple_2_1_eq r c) (tuple_2_0_eq r c)));
end;
L271365
have h_s24_t2_adjugate_product_entry_sum: \(\forall i,k\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{{{\widetilde{{A}}}{A}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left((-1)^{{j}+{i}}\det({A}_{{j}{i}}),{A}_{{j},{k}}\right)}_i}\);
proof from hn, h_s24_t2_adjugate_entry (11 steps)
statement: ∀i k ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) i k = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j k));
L271374L271375L271376L271377
let i; assume hi; let k; assume hk;
L271378L271379
have hik: \({\left(i,k\right)} \in {{{n} \cup \{{n}\}} \times {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}\) by tuple_2_setprod from hi, hk;
formal
statement: (i,k) ∈ ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) i hi k hk);
L271380L271387
have hRawProductEntry: \({{{\widetilde{{A}}}{A}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({\widetilde{{A}}}_{{\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(0\right)},{j}},{A}_{{j},{\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(1\right)}}\right)}_i}\) by beta from hik;
formal
statement: matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) i k = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry A j ((i,k) 1)));
proof term: exact (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) (u 0) j) (matrix_entry A j (u 1)))) (i,k) hik);
L271393L271400
have hRawSumToCofactorSum: \({\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({\widetilde{{A}}}_{{\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(0\right)},{j}},{A}_{{j},{\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(1\right)}}\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left((-1)^{{j}+{i}}\det({A}_{{j}{i}}),{A}_{{j},{k}}\right)}_i}\) by ring_finite_sum_congr_natural from hn, h_s24_t2_adjugate_entry, hi;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry A j ((i,k) 1))) = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j k));
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_congr_natural K add (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry A j ((i,k) 1))) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j k)) (λj hj ⇒ god1_binary_operation_congruence mul (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j ((i,k) 1)) (matrix_entry A j k) (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) z j) ((i,k) 0) i (tuple_2_0_eq i k)) (h_s24_t2_adjugate_entry i hi j hj)) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ matrix_entry A j z) ((i,k) 1) k (tuple_2_1_eq i k))));
L271421
thus thesis by transitivity from hRawProductEntry, hRawSumToCofactorSum;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) i k) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry A j ((i,k) 1)))) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j k))) hRawProductEntry hRawSumToCofactorSum);
end;
L271433L271448
have h_s24_t2_theorem1_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall m0\in \omega,\;\forall B0\in M_{{{m0} \cup \{{m0}\}}}({K0}),\;({K0},{\mathsf{add0}},{\mathsf{mul0}})\text{ is a commutative ring} \to {\forall j\in {m0} \cup \{{m0}\},\;{\det({B0})} = {\sum_{i\in {{m0} \cup \{{m0}\}}}{\lambda i,\;\mathsf{mul0}\left({B0}_{{i},{j}},(-1)^{{i}+{j}}\det({B0}_{{i}{j}})\right)}_i}} \land {\forall i\in {m0} \cup \{{m0}\},\;{\det({B0})} = {\sum_{i\in {{m0} \cup \{{m0}\}}}{\lambda j,\;\mathsf{mul0}\left({B0}_{{i},{j}},(-1)^{{i}+{j}}\det({B0}_{{i}{j}})\right)}_i}}\) by s24_theorem1_laplace_expansion_along_row_or_column;
formal
statement: ∀K0, ∀add0 mul0 : set → set → set, ∀m0 ∈ ω, ∀B0 ∈ square_matrix_ring K0 (ordsucc m0), commutative_ring K0 add0 mul0 → (∀j ∈ ordsucc m0, matrix_determinant K0 add0 mul0 (ordsucc m0) B0 = ring_finite_sum K0 add0 (ordsucc m0) (λi ⇒ mul0 (matrix_entry B0 i j) (matrix_cofactor K0 add0 mul0 m0 i j B0))) ∧ ∀i ∈ ordsucc m0, matrix_determinant K0 add0 mul0 (ordsucc m0) B0 = ring_finite_sum K0 add0 (ordsucc m0) (λj ⇒ mul0 (matrix_entry B0 i j) (matrix_cofactor K0 add0 mul0 m0 i j B0));
proof term: apply god1_s24_theorem1_laplace_expansion_along_row_or_column;
L271449L271454
have h_s24_t2_column_expansion: \(\forall i\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{\det({A})} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({A}_{{j},{i}},(-1)^{{j}+{i}}\det({A}_{{j}{i}})\right)}_i}\) by h_s24_t2_theorem1_formal_call, hn, hA, hRing;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A j i) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A));
proof term: exact (andEL (∀i ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A j i) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A))) (∀i ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n i j A))) (h_s24_t2_theorem1_formal_call K add mul n hn A hA hRing));
L271466
have h_s24_t2_diagonal_cofactor_sum: \(\forall i\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left((-1)^{{j}+{i}}\det({A}_{{j}{i}}),{A}_{{j},{i}}\right)}_i} = {\det({A})}\);
proof from hn, hRing, h_s24_t2_cofactor_in, hA, h_s24_t2_column_expansion (5 steps)
statement: ∀i ∈ ordsucc n, ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j i)) = matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A;
L271471L271472
let i; assume hi;
L271473L271479
have hReorder: \({\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left((-1)^{{j}+{i}}\det({A}_{{j}{i}}),{A}_{{j},{i}}\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({A}_{{j},{i}},(-1)^{{j}+{i}}\det({A}_{{j}{i}})\right)}_i}\) by ring_finite_sum_congr_natural from hn, hRing, h_s24_t2_cofactor_in, hA, hi;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j i)) = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A j i) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A));
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_congr_natural K add (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j i)) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A j i) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A)) (λj hj ⇒ (andER (ring K add mul) (commutative_on K mul) hRing) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (h_s24_t2_cofactor_in A hA j hj i hi) (matrix_entry A j i) (ap_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ K) A (j,i) hA (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) j hj i hi))));
L271492
thus thesis by transitivity from hReorder, h_s24_t2_column_expansion, hi;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j i))) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A j i) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A))) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) hReorder (eq_sym (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A j i) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A))) (h_s24_t2_column_expansion i hi)));
end;
L271507
have h_s24_t2_cross_cofactor_sum_zero: \(\forall B\in M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K}),\;\forall i,k\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{i} \neq {k} \to {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left((-1)^{{j}+{i}}\det({B}_{{j}{i}}),{B}_{{j},{k}}\right)}_i} = {0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hn, hRing, h_s24_t2_skip_index_in, h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in, h_s24_t2_skip_index_avoids, h_s24_t2_theorem1_formal_call, h_s24_t2_cofactor_in (109 steps)
statement: ∀B ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n), ∀i k ∈ ordsucc n, i ≠ k → ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i B) (matrix_entry B j k)) = ring_zero K add;
L271513L271514L271515L271516L271517L271518
let B; assume hB; let i; assume hi; let k; assume hk, hik;
L271519L271522
have hColumnFamily: \({\lambda c\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda r\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{r},{c}}} \in {{{K}^{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}^{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}\) by lam_Pi from hB;
formal
statement: (λc ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λr ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B r c) ∈ (Kordsucc n)ordsucc n;

formal

have hKNeI: \({k} \neq {i}\);

assume hki;

thus thesis by hik from hki;

have hColumnVanish: \(\forall x\in {{K}^{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}^{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}},\;\exists c,d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{{c} \neq {d}} \land {{x\left(c\right)} = {x\left(d\right)}} \to {\det({[{\lambda c,\;x\left(c\right)}_1\ \cdots\ {\lambda c,\;x\left(c\right)}_n]})} = {0_{{K}}}\) by hColumnAlternating;
formal

formal

have hUpdatedAtIEval: \({\left(\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(i\right)\right)\left(r\right)} = {\left(\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}\right)\left(r\right)}\) by substitution from hReplacementAtI;

thus thesis by transitivity from hReplacementMatrixBeta, hReplacementCoordinates, hUpdatedAtIEval, hr;

L271822
have hBoundedColumnEval: \(\forall d,q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{\left(\lambda s\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{s},{d}}\right)\left(q\right)} = {{B}_{{q},{d}}}\);
proof (5 steps)
statement: ∀d q ∈ ordsucc n, (λs ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B s d) q = matrix_entry B q d;
L271825L271826L271827L271828
let d; assume hd; let q; assume hq;
L271829
thus thesis by beta from hq;
formal
exact (beta (ordsucc n) (λs ⇒ matrix_entry B s d) q hq);
end;
L271830
have hReplacementEntryAway: \(\forall r,c\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{c} \neq {i} \to {{[{\lambda z,\;\left({\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(z\right)}_1\ \cdots\ {\lambda z,\;\left({\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(z\right)}_n]}_{{r},{c}}} = {{B}_{{r},{c}}}\);
proof from hBoundedColumnEval (19 steps)
statement: ∀r c ∈ ordsucc n, c ≠ i → matrix_entry (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λz ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) z)) r c = matrix_entry B r c;
L271837L271838L271839L271840
let r; assume hr; let c; assume hc, hci;
L271841L271842
have hrcPair: \({\left(r,c\right)} \in {{{n} \cup \{{n}\}} \times {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}\) by tuple_2_setprod from hr, hc;
formal
statement: (r,c) ∈ ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) r hr c hc);
L271843L271852
have hReplacementAwayBeta: \({{[{\lambda z,\;\left({\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(z\right)}_1\ \cdots\ {\lambda z,\;\left({\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(z\right)}_n]}_{{r},{c}}} = {\left(\left({\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(\left(\left(r,c\right)\right)\left(1\right)\right)\right)\left(\left(\left(r,c\right)\right)\left(0\right)\right)}\) by beta from hrcPair;
formal
statement: matrix_entry (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λz ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) z)) r c = indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) ((r,c) 1) ((r,c) 0);
proof term: exact (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) (u 1) (u 0)) (r,c) hrcPair);
L271858L271865
have hReplacementAwayCoordinates: \({\left(\left({\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(\left(\left(r,c\right)\right)\left(1\right)\right)\right)\left(\left(\left(r,c\right)\right)\left(0\right)\right)} = {\left(\left({\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)\right)\left(r\right)}\) by binary_operation_congruence;
formal
statement: indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) ((r,c) 1) ((r,c) 0) = indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c r;
proof term: exact (god1_binary_operation_congruence (λd q ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λs ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B s z) i (λs ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B s k) d q) ((r,c) 1) c ((r,c) 0) r (tuple_2_1_eq r c) (tuple_2_0_eq r c));
L271871L271875
have hUpdatedAwayEval: \({\left(\left({\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)\right)\left(r\right)} = {\left(\left(\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}\right)\left(c\right)\right)\left(r\right)}\) by substitution using indexed_function_update_other from hc, hci;
formal
statement: indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c r = ((λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) c) r;
proof term: exact (f_eq_i (λcolumn ⇒ column r) (indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c) ((λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) c) (god1_indexed_function_update_other (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c hc hci));
L271883L271886
have hOriginalColumnOuterBeta: \({\left(\left(\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}\right)\left(c\right)\right)\left(r\right)} = {\left(\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{c}}\right)\left(r\right)}\) by substitution from hc;
formal
statement: ((λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) c) r = (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q c) r;

L271891L271894
have hOriginalColumnInnerBeta: \({\left(\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{c}}\right)\left(r\right)} = {{B}_{{r},{c}}}\) by hBoundedColumnEval from hc, hr;
formal
statement: (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q c) r = matrix_entry B r c;
proof term: exact (hBoundedColumnEval c hc r hr);
L271895L271898
have hOriginalColumnFullBeta: \({\left(\left(\lambda d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{d}}\right)\left(c\right)\right)\left(r\right)} = {{B}_{{r},{c}}}\) by transitivity from hOriginalColumnOuterBeta, hOriginalColumnInnerBeta;
formal
statement: ((λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) c) r = matrix_entry B r c;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (((λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) c) r) ((λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q c) r) (matrix_entry B r c) hOriginalColumnOuterBeta hOriginalColumnInnerBeta);
L271903
thus thesis by transitivity from hReplacementAwayBeta, hReplacementAwayCoordinates, hUpdatedAwayEval, hOriginalColumnFullBeta;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λz ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) z)) r c) (indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) ((r,c) 1) ((r,c) 0)) (matrix_entry B r c) hReplacementAwayBeta (eq_i_tra (indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) ((r,c) 1) ((r,c) 0)) (indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c r) (matrix_entry B r c) hReplacementAwayCoordinates (eq_i_tra (indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c r) (((λd ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q d) c) r) (matrix_entry B r c) hUpdatedAwayEval hOriginalColumnFullBeta)));
end;
L271933
have hSkipRaw: \(\forall a\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\forall q\in n,\;{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{a}\}}} \in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_skip_index_in (5 steps)
L271935L271936L271937L271938
let a; assume ha; let q; assume hq;
L271939
thus thesis by substitution from hq, h_s24_t2_skip_index_in, ha;
formal
exact (mem_eq_substR (ordsucc n) ((λz ∈ n ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n a z) q) (skip_ordinal_index n a q) (beta n (λz ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n a z) q hq) (ap_Pi n (λz ⇒ ordsucc n) (λz ∈ n ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n a z) q (h_s24_t2_skip_index_in a ha) hq));
end;
L271946
have hReplacementMinorEq: \(\forall r\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{{[{\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_1\ \cdots\ {\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_n]}_{{r}{i}}} = {{B}_{{r}{i}}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in, hReplacementMatrixIn, hi, hB, hSkipRaw, h_s24_t2_skip_index_avoids, hReplacementEntryAway (24 steps)
statement: ∀r ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_minor n r i (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) = matrix_minor n r i B;
L271953L271954
let r; assume hr;
L271955L271961
have hLeftMinorIn: \({{[{\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_1\ \cdots\ {\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_n]}_{{r}{i}}} \in {M_{{n}}({K})}\) by h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in from hReplacementMatrixIn, hr, hi;
formal
statement: matrix_minor n r i (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) ∈ square_matrix_ring K n;
proof term: exact (h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) hReplacementMatrixIn r hr i hi);
L271967L271969
have hRightMinorIn: \({{B}_{{r}{i}}} \in {M_{{n}}({K})}\) by h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in from hB, hr, hi;
formal
statement: matrix_minor n r i B ∈ square_matrix_ring K n;
proof term: exact (h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in B hB r hr i hi);
L271970
apply extensionality from hLeftMinorIn, hRightMinorIn;
L271977L271978
let u; assume hu;
L271979L271980
have huCoords: \({{u\left(0\right)} \in {n}} \land {{u\left(1\right)} \in {n}}\) by setprod_elim_0_1 from hu;
L271981L271982
have hSkipRowIn: \({[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}} \in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}\) by hSkipRaw from hr, huCoords;
formal
statement: skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0) ∈ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (hSkipRaw r hr (u 0) (andEL (u 0 ∈ n) (u 1 ∈ n) huCoords));
L271984L271985
have hSkipColIn: \({[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{i}\}}} \in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}\) by hSkipRaw from hi, huCoords;
formal
statement: skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1) ∈ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (hSkipRaw i hi (u 1) (andER (u 0 ∈ n) (u 1 ∈ n) huCoords));
L271987L271988
have hSkipColNeI: \({[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{i}\}}} \neq {i}\) by h_s24_t2_skip_index_avoids from hi, huCoords;
formal
statement: skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1) ≠ i;
proof term: exact (h_s24_t2_skip_index_avoids i hi (u 1) (andER (u 0 ∈ n) (u 1 ∈ n) huCoords));
L271990L272002
have hLeftMinorBeta: \({\left({[{\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_1\ \cdots\ {\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_n]}_{{r}{i}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {{[{\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_1\ \cdots\ {\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_n]}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{i}\}}}}}\) by beta from hu;
formal
statement: matrix_minor n r i (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) u = matrix_entry (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1));
proof term: exact (beta (n ⨯ n) (λw ⇒ matrix_entry (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (w 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (w 1))) u hu);
L272010L272014
have hRightMinorBeta: \({\left({B}_{{r}{i}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {{B}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{i}\}}}}}\) by beta from hu;
formal
statement: matrix_minor n r i B u = matrix_entry B (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1));
proof term: exact (beta (n ⨯ n) (λw ⇒ matrix_entry B (skip_ordinal_index n r (w 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (w 1))) u hu);
L272018L272028
have hReplacementMinorEntry: \({{[{\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_1\ \cdots\ {\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_n]}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{i}\}}}}} = {{B}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{i}\}}}}}\) by hReplacementEntryAway from hSkipRowIn, hSkipColIn, hSkipColNeI;
formal
statement: matrix_entry (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1)) = matrix_entry B (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1));
proof term: exact (hReplacementEntryAway (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) hSkipRowIn (skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1)) hSkipColIn hSkipColNeI);
L272031
thus thesis by transitivity from hLeftMinorBeta, hReplacementMinorEntry, hRightMinorBeta;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_minor n r i (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) u) (matrix_entry (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1))) (matrix_minor n r i B u) hLeftMinorBeta (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1))) (matrix_entry B (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1))) (matrix_minor n r i B u) hReplacementMinorEntry (eq_sym (matrix_minor n r i B u) (matrix_entry B (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n i (u 1))) hRightMinorBeta)));
end;
L272065
have hReplacementCofactorEq: \(\forall r\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{(-1)^{{r}+{i}}\det({[{\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_1\ \cdots\ {\lambda c,\;\left({\lambda z\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{z}}}[{i}:={\lambda q\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{B}_{{q},{k}}}]\right)\left(c\right)}_n]}_{{r}{i}})} = {(-1)^{{r}+{i}}\det({B}_{{r}{i}})}\);
proof from hReplacementMinorEq (3 steps)
statement: ∀r ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_cofactor K add mul n r i (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)) = matrix_cofactor K add mul n r i B;
L272072L272073
let r; assume hr;
L272074
thus thesis by binary_operation_congruence from hReplacementMinorEq, hr;
formal
exact (god1_binary_operation_congruence mul (cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul (r + i)) (cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul (r + i)) (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n r i (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c)))) (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n r i B)) (eq_ref (cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul (r + i))) (f_eq_i (matrix_determinant K add mul n) (matrix_minor n r i (matrix_from_columns K (ordsucc n) (λc ⇒ indexed_function_update (ordsucc n) (λz ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q z) i (λq ∈ ordsucc n ⇒ matrix_entry B q k) c))) (matrix_minor n r i B) (hReplacementMinorEq r hr)));
end;
L272093L272110

L272292
have h_s24_t2_adjugate_times_matrix_entry_goal: \(\forall i,k\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{{{\widetilde{{A}}}{A}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\operatorname{if}\;{i} = {k}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_adjugate_product_entry_sum, h_s24_t2_diagonal_cofactor_sum, h_s24_t2_cross_cofactor_sum_zero, hA (11 steps)
statement: ∀i k ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) i k = if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L272298L272299L272300L272301
let i; assume hi; let k; assume hk;
L272302
have hSame: \({i} = {k} \to {{{\widetilde{{A}}}{A}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\operatorname{if}\;{i} = {k}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_adjugate_product_entry_sum, hi, hk, h_s24_t2_diagonal_cofactor_sum (2 steps)
statement: i = k → matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) i k = if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L272308
assume hik;
L272309
thus thesis by transitivity from h_s24_t2_adjugate_product_entry_sum, hi, hk, hik, h_s24_t2_diagonal_cofactor_sum;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) i k) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j k))) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (h_s24_t2_adjugate_product_entry_sum i hi k hk) (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j k))) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j i))) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j z))) k i (eq_sym i k hik)) (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j i))) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (h_s24_t2_diagonal_cofactor_sum i hi) (eq_sym (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (If_i_1 (i = k) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add) hik)))));
end;
L272348
have hDifferent: \({i} \neq {k} \to {{{\widetilde{{A}}}{A}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\operatorname{if}\;{i} = {k}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_adjugate_product_entry_sum, hi, hk, h_s24_t2_cross_cofactor_sum_zero, hA (2 steps)
statement: i ≠ k → matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) i k = if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L272354
assume hik;
L272355
thus thesis by transitivity from h_s24_t2_adjugate_product_entry_sum, hi, hk, h_s24_t2_cross_cofactor_sum_zero, hA, hik;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) i k) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j k))) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (h_s24_t2_adjugate_product_entry_sum i hi k hk) (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j i A) (matrix_entry A j k))) (ring_zero K add) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (h_s24_t2_cross_cofactor_sum_zero A hA i hi k hk hik) (eq_sym (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (ring_zero K add) (If_i_0 (i = k) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add) hik))));
end;
L272380
thus thesis by orE from hSame, hDifferent;
formal
exact (orE (i = k) (i ≠ k) (xm (i = k)) (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) i k = if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) hSame hDifferent);
end;
L272387
have h_s24_t2_adjugate_times_matrix: \({{\widetilde{{A}}}{A}} = {{\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_cofactor_in, hA, hn, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hRing, h_s24_t2_one_in, h_s24_t2_adjugate_times_matrix_entry_goal (32 steps)
statement: matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A = matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n));
L272393L272395
have hAdjugateIn: \({\widetilde{{A}}} \in {M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K})}\) by lam_Pi from h_s24_t2_cofactor_in, hA;
formal
statement: matrix_adjugate K add mul n A ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n);
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ matrix_cofactor K add mul n (u 1) (u 0) A) (λu hu ⇒ h_s24_t2_cofactor_in A hA (u 1) (andER (u 0 ∈ ordsucc n) (u 1 ∈ ordsucc n) (setprod_elim_0_1 (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) u hu)) (u 0) (andEL (u 0 ∈ ordsucc n) (u 1 ∈ ordsucc n) (setprod_elim_0_1 (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) u hu))));
L272402L272406
have hAdjugateProductIn: \({{\widetilde{{A}}}{A}} \in {M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K})}\) by matrix_multiplication_in from hn, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hAdjugateIn, hA;
formal
statement: matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n);
proof term: exact (god1_matrix_multiplication_in K add mul (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) h_s24_t2_core_ring (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) hAdjugateIn A hA);
L272412L272414
have hDeterminantIn: \({\det({A})} \in {K}\) by matrix_determinant_in from hn, hA, hRing;
formal
statement: matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_matrix_determinant_in K add mul (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) A hA hRing);
L272416L272417
have hZeroIn: \({0_{{K}}} \in {K}\) by group_identity_in from h_s24_t2_core_ring;
formal
statement: ring_zero K add ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_group_identity_in K add (god1_ring_additive_group K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring));
L272419L272421
have hUnitIn: \({1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}} \in {M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K})}\) by if_member_by_cases from h_s24_t2_one_in, hZeroIn;
formal
statement: unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n);
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) (λu hu ⇒ god1_if_member_by_cases K (u 0 = u 1) (ring_one K mul) (ring_zero K add) (λ_ ⇒ h_s24_t2_one_in) (λ_ ⇒ hZeroIn)));
L272426L272431
have hScaledUnitIn: \({{\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}} \in {M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K})}\) by ring_multiplicative_law from h_s24_t2_core_ring, hDeterminantIn, hUnitIn;
formal
statement: matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n);
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u)) (λu hu ⇒ god1_ring_multiplicative_law K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) hDeterminantIn (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u) (ap_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λ_ ⇒ K) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u hUnitIn hu)));
L272440
have hScaledUnitValue: \(\forall u\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}} \times {{n} \cup \{{n}\}},\;{\left({\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {\operatorname{if}\;{u\left(0\right)} = {u\left(1\right)}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_core_ring, hDeterminantIn (9 steps)
statement: ∀u ∈ ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n, matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u = if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L272448L272449
let u; assume hu;
L272450
have hSame: \({u\left(0\right)} = {u\left(1\right)} \to {\left({\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {\operatorname{if}\;{u\left(0\right)} = {u\left(1\right)}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hu, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hDeterminantIn (2 steps)
statement: u 0 = u 1 → matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u = if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L272457
assume heq;
L272458
thus thesis by transitivity using ring_multiplicative_identity_specification from hu, heq, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hDeterminantIn;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add)) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (eq_i_tra (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u)) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add)) (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λw ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) w)) u hu) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) z) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λw ⇒ if w 0 = w 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) u hu))) (eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add)) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_one K mul)) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) z) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) (ring_one K mul) (If_i_1 (u 0 = u 1) (ring_one K mul) (ring_zero K add) heq)) (eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_one K mul)) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (andEL (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_one K mul) = matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (mul (ring_one K mul) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) = matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) ((andER (ring_one K mul ∈ K) (∀value ∈ K, mul value (ring_one K mul) = value ∧ mul (ring_one K mul) value = value) (god1_ring_multiplicative_identity_specification K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring)) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) hDeterminantIn)) (eq_sym (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (If_i_1 (u 0 = u 1) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add) heq)))));
end;
L272530
have hDifferent: \({u\left(0\right)} \neq {u\left(1\right)} \to {\left({\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {\operatorname{if}\;{u\left(0\right)} = {u\left(1\right)}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hu, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hDeterminantIn (2 steps)
statement: u 0 ≠ u 1 → matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u = if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L272537
assume hneq;
L272538
thus thesis by transitivity using ring_zero_multiplication_right from hu, hneq, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hDeterminantIn;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add)) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (eq_i_tra (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u)) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add)) (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λw ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) w)) u hu) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) z) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λw ⇒ if w 0 = w 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) u hu))) (eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add)) (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add)) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) z) (if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) (ring_zero K add) (If_i_0 (u 0 = u 1) (ring_one K mul) (ring_zero K add) hneq)) (eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add)) (ring_zero K add) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (god1_ring_zero_multiplication_right K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) hDeterminantIn) (eq_sym (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (ring_zero K add) (If_i_0 (u 0 = u 1) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add) hneq)))));
end;
L272598
thus thesis by orE from hSame, hDifferent;
formal
exact (orE (u 0 = u 1) (u 0 ≠ u 1) (xm (u 0 = u 1)) (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u = if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) hSame hDifferent);
end;
L272606
apply extensionality from hAdjugateProductIn, hScaledUnitIn;
L272612L272613
let u; assume hu;
L272614L272615
have hu0: \({u\left(0\right)} \in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}\) by hu;
formal
statement: u 0 ∈ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (andEL (u 0 ∈ ordsucc n) (u 1 ∈ ordsucc n) (setprod_elim_0_1 (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) u hu));
L272617L272618
have hu1: \({u\left(1\right)} \in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}\) by hu;
formal
statement: u 1 ∈ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (andER (u 0 ∈ ordsucc n) (u 1 ∈ ordsucc n) (setprod_elim_0_1 (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) u hu));
L272620L272621
have hPairEta: \({\left(u\left(0\right),u\left(1\right)\right)} = {u}\) by tuple_Sigma_eta from hu;
formal
statement: (u 0,u 1) = u;
proof term: exact (tuple_Sigma_eta (ordsucc n) (λ_ ⇒ ordsucc n) u hu);
L272622
thus thesis by transitivity from hPairEta, h_s24_t2_adjugate_times_matrix_entry_goal, hu0, hu1, hScaledUnitValue, hu;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A u) (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) (u 0) (u 1)) (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A z) u (u 0,u 1) (eq_sym (u 0,u 1) u hPairEta)) (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) A) (u 0) (u 1)) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (h_s24_t2_adjugate_times_matrix_entry_goal (u 0) hu0 (u 1) hu1) (eq_sym (matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u) (if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (hScaledUnitValue u hu))));
end;
L272656L272660
have h_s24_t2_transpose_A_in: \({{}^t{A}} \in {M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K})}\) by matrix_transpose_in from hA;
formal
statement: matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n);
proof term: exact (god1_matrix_transpose_in K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A hA);
L272661
have h_s24_t2_skip_raw: \(\forall d\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;\forall q\in n,\;{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{d}\}}} \in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_skip_index_in (5 steps)
L272663L272664L272665L272666
let d; assume hd; let q; assume hq;
L272667
thus thesis by substitution from hq, h_s24_t2_skip_index_in, hd;
formal
exact (mem_eq_substR (ordsucc n) ((λz ∈ n ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n d z) q) (skip_ordinal_index n d q) (beta n (λz ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n d z) q hq) (ap_Pi n (λ_ ⇒ ordsucc n) (λz ∈ n ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n d z) q (h_s24_t2_skip_index_in d hd) hq));
end;
L272674
have h_s24_t2_minor_transpose: \(\forall r,c\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{{{}^t{A}}_{{r}{c}}} = {{}^t{{A}_{{c}{r}}}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in, h_s24_t2_transpose_A_in, hA, h_s24_t2_skip_raw (28 steps)
statement: ∀r c ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_minor n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) = matrix_transpose K n n (matrix_minor n c r A);
L272678L272679L272680L272681
let r; assume hr; let c; assume hc;
L272682L272685
have hLeftMinorIn: \({{{}^t{A}}_{{r}{c}}} \in {M_{{n}}({K})}\) by h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in from h_s24_t2_transpose_A_in, hr, hc;
formal
statement: matrix_minor n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) ∈ square_matrix_ring K n;
proof term: exact (h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) h_s24_t2_transpose_A_in r hr c hc);
L272688L272690
have hRightMinorIn: \({{}^t{{A}_{{c}{r}}}} \in {M_{{n}}({K})}\) by matrix_transpose_in from h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in, hA, hc, hr;
formal
statement: matrix_transpose K n n (matrix_minor n c r A) ∈ square_matrix_ring K n;
proof term: exact (god1_matrix_transpose_in K n n (matrix_minor n c r A) (h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in A hA c hc r hr));
L272692
apply extensionality from hLeftMinorIn, hRightMinorIn;
L272696L272697
let u; assume hu;
L272698L272699
have hu0: \({u\left(0\right)} \in {n}\) by hu;
formal
statement: u 0 ∈ n;
proof term: exact (andEL (u 0 ∈ n) (u 1 ∈ n) (setprod_elim_0_1 n n u hu));
L272701L272702
have hu1: \({u\left(1\right)} \in {n}\) by hu;
formal
statement: u 1 ∈ n;
proof term: exact (andER (u 0 ∈ n) (u 1 ∈ n) (setprod_elim_0_1 n n u hu));
L272704L272709
have hLeftBeta: \({\left({{}^t{A}}_{{r}{c}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {{{}^t{A}}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{c}\}}}}}\) by beta from hu;
formal
statement: matrix_minor n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) u = matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1));
proof term: exact (beta (n ⨯ n) (λw ⇒ matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) (skip_ordinal_index n r (w 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n c (w 1))) u hu);
L272714L272721
have hLeftEntry: \({{{}^t{A}}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{c}\}}}}} = {{A}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{c}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}}}}\) by matrix_transpose_entry from hA, h_s24_t2_skip_raw, hc, hu1, hr, hu0;
formal
statement: matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) = matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0));
proof term: exact (god1_matrix_transpose_entry K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A hA (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (h_s24_t2_skip_raw c hc (u 1) hu1) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (h_s24_t2_skip_raw r hr (u 0) hu0));
L272726L272727
have hSwapPair: \({\left(u\left(1\right),u\left(0\right)\right)} \in {{n} \times {n}}\) by tuple_2_setprod from hu1, hu0;
formal
statement: (u 1,u 0) ∈ n ⨯ n;
proof term: exact (tuple_2_setprod n n (u 1) hu1 (u 0) hu0);
L272728L272730
have hRightBeta: \({\left({}^t{{A}_{{c}{r}}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {\left({A}_{{c}{r}}\right)\left(\left(u\left(1\right),u\left(0\right)\right)\right)}\) by beta from hu;
formal
statement: matrix_transpose K n n (matrix_minor n c r A) u = matrix_minor n c r A (u 1,u 0);
proof term: exact (beta (n ⨯ n) (λw ⇒ matrix_minor n c r A (w 1,w 0)) u hu);
L272732L272736
have hMinorBeta: \({\left({A}_{{c}{r}}\right)\left(\left(u\left(1\right),u\left(0\right)\right)\right)} = {{A}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{c}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}}}}\) by beta from hSwapPair;
formal
statement: matrix_minor n c r A (u 1,u 0) = matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c ((u 1,u 0) 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n r ((u 1,u 0) 1));
proof term: exact (beta (n ⨯ n) (λw ⇒ matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c (w 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (w 1))) (u 1,u 0) hSwapPair);
L272740L272746
have hSwapEntries: \({{A}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{c}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}}}} = {{A}_{{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{c}\}}},{[k\mapsto k]_{{n}\setminus\{{r}\}}}}}\) by binary_operation_congruence;
formal
statement: matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c ((u 1,u 0) 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n r ((u 1,u 0) 1)) = matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0));
proof term: exact (god1_binary_operation_congruence (λrow column ⇒ matrix_entry A row column) (skip_ordinal_index n c ((u 1,u 0) 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n r ((u 1,u 0) 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n c z) ((u 1,u 0) 0) (u 1) (tuple_2_0_eq (u 1) (u 0))) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ skip_ordinal_index n r z) ((u 1,u 0) 1) (u 0) (tuple_2_1_eq (u 1) (u 0))));
L272756
thus thesis by transitivity from hLeftBeta, hLeftEntry, hRightBeta, hMinorBeta, hSwapEntries;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_minor n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) u) (matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0))) (matrix_transpose K n n (matrix_minor n c r A) u) (eq_i_tra (matrix_minor n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) u) (matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1))) (matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0))) hLeftBeta hLeftEntry) (eq_sym (matrix_transpose K n n (matrix_minor n c r A) u) (matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0))) (eq_i_tra (matrix_transpose K n n (matrix_minor n c r A) u) (matrix_minor n c r A (u 1,u 0)) (matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0))) hRightBeta (eq_i_tra (matrix_minor n c r A (u 1,u 0)) (matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c ((u 1,u 0) 0)) (skip_ordinal_index n r ((u 1,u 0) 1))) (matrix_entry A (skip_ordinal_index n c (u 1)) (skip_ordinal_index n r (u 0))) hMinorBeta hSwapEntries))));
end;
L272791
have h_s24_t2_cofactor_transpose: \(\forall r,c\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{(-1)^{{r}+{c}}\det({{}^t{A}}_{{r}{c}})} = {(-1)^{{c}+{r}}\det({A}_{{c}{r}})}\);
proof from hn, h_s24_t2_minor_transpose, h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in, hA, hRing (13 steps)
statement: ∀r c ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_cofactor K add mul n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) = matrix_cofactor K add mul n c r A;
L272795L272796L272797L272798
let r; assume hr; let c; assume hc;
L272799L272800
have hrOmega: \({r} \in {\omega}\) by omega_TransSet from hn, hr;
formal
statement: r ∈ ω;
proof term: exact (omega_TransSet (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) r hr);
L272801L272802
have hcOmega: \({c} \in {\omega}\) by omega_TransSet from hn, hc;
formal
statement: c ∈ ω;
proof term: exact (omega_TransSet (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) c hc);
L272803L272805
have hSignEq: \({(-1)^{{{r} + {c}}}} = {(-1)^{{{c} + {r}}}}\) by substitution from hrOmega, hcOmega;
formal
statement: cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul (r + c) = cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul (c + r);
proof term: exact (f_eq_i (λq ⇒ cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul q) (r + c) (c + r) (add_SNo_com r c (omega_SNo r hrOmega) (omega_SNo c hcOmega)));
L272808L272812
have hMinorDetEq: \({\det({{{}^t{A}}_{{r}{c}}})} = {\det({{A}_{{c}{r}}})}\) by transitivity using s23_theorem6_determinant_of_transpose from h_s24_t2_minor_transpose, hr, hc, hn, h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in, hA, hRing;
formal
statement: matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A)) = matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n c r A);
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A))) (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_transpose K n n (matrix_minor n c r A))) (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n c r A)) (f_eq_i (λB ⇒ matrix_determinant K add mul n B) (matrix_minor n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A)) (matrix_transpose K n n (matrix_minor n c r A)) (h_s24_t2_minor_transpose r hr c hc)) (eq_sym (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n c r A)) (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_transpose K n n (matrix_minor n c r A))) (god1_s23_theorem6_determinant_of_transpose K add mul n hn (matrix_minor n c r A) (h_s24_t2_minor_matrix_in A hA c hc r hr) hRing)));
L272831
thus thesis by binary_operation_congruence from hSignEq, hMinorDetEq;
formal
exact (god1_binary_operation_congruence mul (cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul (r + c)) (cofactor_sign_scalar K add mul (c + r)) (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n r c (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A))) (matrix_determinant K add mul n (matrix_minor n c r A)) hSignEq hMinorDetEq);
end;
L272839
have h_s24_t2_matrix_times_adjugate: \({{A}{\widetilde{{A}}}} = {{\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}}\);
proof from hn, h_s24_t2_adjugate_entry, h_s24_t2_theorem1_formal_call, hA, hRing, h_s24_t2_cross_cofactor_sum_zero, h_s24_t2_transpose_A_in, h_s24_t2_cofactor_in, h_s24_t2_cofactor_transpose, h_s24_t2_core_ring, h_s24_t2_one_in (73 steps)
statement: matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) = matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n));
L272845
have hProductEntrySum: \(\forall i,k\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{{{A}{\widetilde{{A}}}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{j}},(-1)^{{k}+{j}}\det({A}_{{k}{j}})\right)}_i}\);
proof from hn, h_s24_t2_adjugate_entry (11 steps)
statement: ∀i k ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) i k = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A));
L272852L272853L272854L272855
let i; assume hi; let k; assume hk;
L272856L272857
have hik: \({\left(i,k\right)} \in {{{n} \cup \{{n}\}} \times {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}\) by tuple_2_setprod from hi, hk;
formal
statement: (i,k) ∈ ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n;
proof term: exact (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) i hi k hk);
L272858L272865
have hRawProductEntry: \({{{A}{\widetilde{{A}}}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({A}_{{\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(0\right)},{j}},{\widetilde{{A}}}_{{j},{\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(1\right)}}\right)}_i}\) by beta from hik;
formal
statement: matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) i k = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) j ((i,k) 1)));
proof term: exact (beta (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A (u 0) j) (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) j (u 1)))) (i,k) hik);
L272871L272878
have hRawSumToCofactorSum: \({\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({A}_{{\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(0\right)},{j}},{\widetilde{{A}}}_{{j},{\left(\left(i,k\right)\right)\left(1\right)}}\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{j}},(-1)^{{k}+{j}}\det({A}_{{k}{j}})\right)}_i}\) by ring_finite_sum_congr_natural from hn, h_s24_t2_adjugate_entry, hk;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) j ((i,k) 1))) = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A));
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_congr_natural K add (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) j ((i,k) 1))) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A)) (λj hj ⇒ god1_binary_operation_congruence mul (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) j ((i,k) 1)) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ matrix_entry A z j) ((i,k) 0) i (tuple_2_0_eq i k)) (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) j ((i,k) 1)) (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) j k) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) j z) ((i,k) 1) k (tuple_2_1_eq i k)) (h_s24_t2_adjugate_entry j hj k hk))));
L272899
thus thesis by transitivity from hRawProductEntry, hRawSumToCofactorSum;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) i k) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A ((i,k) 0) j) (matrix_entry (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) j ((i,k) 1)))) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A))) hRawProductEntry hRawSumToCofactorSum);
end;
L272911L272916
have hRowExpansion: \(\forall i\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{\det({A})} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{j}},(-1)^{{i}+{j}}\det({A}_{{i}{j}})\right)}_i}\) by h_s24_t2_theorem1_formal_call, hn, hA, hRing;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n i j A));
proof term: exact (andER (∀j ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λi ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n i j A))) (∀i ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n i j A))) (h_s24_t2_theorem1_formal_call K add mul n hn A hA hRing));
L272928L272929
have hCommutative: \(\forall x,y\in {K},\ {mul}(x,y)={mul}(y,x)\) by hRing;
formal
statement: commutative_on K mul;
proof term: exact (andER (ring K add mul) (commutative_on K mul) hRing);
L272930
have hCrossRowSumZero: \(\forall i,k\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{i} \neq {k} \to {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{j}},(-1)^{{k}+{j}}\det({A}_{{k}{j}})\right)}_i} = {0_{{K}}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_cross_cofactor_sum_zero, h_s24_t2_transpose_A_in, hn, hCommutative, hA, h_s24_t2_cofactor_in, h_s24_t2_cofactor_transpose (12 steps)
statement: ∀i k ∈ ordsucc n, i ≠ k → ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A)) = ring_zero K add;
L272935L272936L272937L272938
let i; assume hi; let k; assume hk, hik;
L272939
have hki: \({k} \neq {i}\);
proof from hik (2 steps)
L272940
assume hkiEq;
L272941
thus thesis by hik from hkiEq;
end;
L272942L272949
have hTransposeCross: \({\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left((-1)^{{j}+{k}}\det({{}^t{A}}_{{j}{k}}),{{}^t{A}}_{{j},{i}}\right)}_i} = {0_{{K}}}\) by h_s24_t2_cross_cofactor_sum_zero from h_s24_t2_transpose_A_in, hk, hi, hki;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j k (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A)) (matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) j i)) = ring_zero K add;
proof term: exact (h_s24_t2_cross_cofactor_sum_zero (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) h_s24_t2_transpose_A_in k hk i hi hki);
L272952L272961
have hSumToTransposeCross: \({\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left({A}_{{i},{j}},(-1)^{{k}+{j}}\det({A}_{{k}{j}})\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}{\lambda j,\;mul\left((-1)^{{j}+{k}}\det({{}^t{A}}_{{j}{k}}),{{}^t{A}}_{{j},{i}}\right)}_i}\) by ring_finite_sum_congr_natural from hn, hCommutative, hA, hi, h_s24_t2_cofactor_in, hk, h_s24_t2_cofactor_transpose;
formal
statement: ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A)) = ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j k (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A)) (matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) j i));
proof term: exact (god1_ring_finite_sum_congr_natural K add (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A)) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j k (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A)) (matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) j i)) (λj hj ⇒ eq_i_tra (mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A)) (mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A) (matrix_entry A i j)) (mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j k (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A)) (matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) j i)) (hCommutative (matrix_entry A i j) (ap_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λ_ ⇒ K) A (i,j) hA (tuple_2_setprod (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) i hi j hj)) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A) (h_s24_t2_cofactor_in A hA k hk j hj)) (god1_binary_operation_congruence mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j k (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A)) (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) j i) (eq_sym (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j k (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A)) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A) (h_s24_t2_cofactor_transpose j hj k hk)) (eq_sym (matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) j i) (matrix_entry A i j) (god1_matrix_transpose_entry K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A hA i hi j hj)))));
L273005
thus thesis by transitivity from hSumToTransposeCross, hTransposeCross;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A))) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_cofactor K add mul n j k (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A)) (matrix_entry (matrix_transpose K (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A) j i))) (ring_zero K add) hSumToTransposeCross hTransposeCross);
end;
L273016
have hEntryGoal: \(\forall i,k\in {n} \cup \{{n}\},\;{{{A}{\widetilde{{A}}}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\operatorname{if}\;{i} = {k}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hProductEntrySum, hRowExpansion, hCrossRowSumZero (11 steps)
statement: ∀i k ∈ ordsucc n, matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) i k = if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L273022L273023L273024L273025
let i; assume hi; let k; assume hk;
L273026
have hSame: \({i} = {k} \to {{{A}{\widetilde{{A}}}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\operatorname{if}\;{i} = {k}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hProductEntrySum, hi, hk, hRowExpansion (2 steps)
statement: i = k → matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) i k = if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L273032
assume hik;
L273033
thus thesis by transitivity from hProductEntrySum, hi, hk, hik, hRowExpansion;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) i k) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A))) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (hProductEntrySum i hi k hk) (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A))) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n i j A))) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n z j A))) k i (eq_sym i k hik)) (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n i j A))) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (eq_sym (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n i j A))) (hRowExpansion i hi)) (eq_sym (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (If_i_1 (i = k) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add) hik)))));
end;
L273077
have hDifferent: \({i} \neq {k} \to {{{A}{\widetilde{{A}}}}_{{i},{k}}} = {\operatorname{if}\;{i} = {k}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hProductEntrySum, hi, hk, hCrossRowSumZero (2 steps)
statement: i ≠ k → matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) i k = if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L273083
assume hik;
L273084
thus thesis by transitivity from hProductEntrySum, hi, hk, hCrossRowSumZero, hik;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) i k) (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A))) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (hProductEntrySum i hi k hk) (eq_i_tra (ring_finite_sum K add (ordsucc n) (λj ⇒ mul (matrix_entry A i j) (matrix_cofactor K add mul n k j A))) (ring_zero K add) (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (hCrossRowSumZero i hi k hk hik) (eq_sym (if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) (ring_zero K add) (If_i_0 (i = k) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (ring_zero K add) hik))));
end;
L273109
thus thesis by orE from hSame, hDifferent;
formal
exact (orE (i = k) (i ≠ k) (xm (i = k)) (matrix_entry (matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A)) i k = if i = k then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add) hSame hDifferent);
end;
L273116L273118
have hRowAdjugateIn: \({\widetilde{{A}}} \in {M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K})}\) by lam_Pi from h_s24_t2_cofactor_in, hA;
formal
statement: matrix_adjugate K add mul n A ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n);
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ matrix_cofactor K add mul n (u 1) (u 0) A) (λu hu ⇒ h_s24_t2_cofactor_in A hA (u 1) (andER (u 0 ∈ ordsucc n) (u 1 ∈ ordsucc n) (setprod_elim_0_1 (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) u hu)) (u 0) (andEL (u 0 ∈ ordsucc n) (u 1 ∈ ordsucc n) (setprod_elim_0_1 (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) u hu))));
L273125L273129
have hRowProductIn: \({{A}{\widetilde{{A}}}} \in {M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K})}\) by matrix_multiplication_in from hn, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hA, hRowAdjugateIn;
formal
statement: matrix_multiplication K add mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) A (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n);
proof term: exact (god1_matrix_multiplication_in K add mul (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) h_s24_t2_core_ring A hA (matrix_adjugate K add mul n A) hRowAdjugateIn);
L273135L273137
have hRowDeterminantIn: \({\det({A})} \in {K}\) by matrix_determinant_in from hn, hA, hRing;
formal
statement: matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_matrix_determinant_in K add mul (ordsucc n) (omega_ordsucc n hn) A hA hRing);
L273139L273140
have hRowZeroIn: \({0_{{K}}} \in {K}\) by group_identity_in from h_s24_t2_core_ring;
formal
statement: ring_zero K add ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_group_identity_in K add (god1_ring_additive_group K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring));
L273142L273144
have hRowUnitIn: \({1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}} \in {M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K})}\) by if_member_by_cases from h_s24_t2_one_in, hRowZeroIn;
formal
statement: unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n);
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ if u 0 = u 1 then ring_one K mul else ring_zero K add) (λu hu ⇒ god1_if_member_by_cases K (u 0 = u 1) (ring_one K mul) (ring_zero K add) (λ_ ⇒ h_s24_t2_one_in) (λ_ ⇒ hRowZeroIn)));
L273149L273154
have hRowScaledUnitIn: \({{\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}} \in {M_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}({K})}\) by ring_multiplicative_law from h_s24_t2_core_ring, hRowDeterminantIn, hRowUnitIn;
formal
statement: matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) ∈ square_matrix_ring K (ordsucc n);
proof term: exact (lam_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λu ⇒ K) (λu ⇒ mul (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u)) (λu hu ⇒ god1_ring_multiplicative_law K add mul h_s24_t2_core_ring (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) hRowDeterminantIn (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n) u) (ap_Pi (ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n) (λ_ ⇒ K) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u hRowUnitIn hu)));
L273163
have hRowScaledUnitValue: \(\forall u\in {{n} \cup \{{n}\}} \times {{n} \cup \{{n}\}},\;{\left({\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {\operatorname{if}\;{u\left(0\right)} = {u\left(1\right)}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from h_s24_t2_core_ring, hRowDeterminantIn (9 steps)
statement: ∀u ∈ ordsucc n ⨯ ordsucc n, matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u = if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;
L273171L273172
let u; assume hu;
L273173
have hSame: \({u\left(0\right)} = {u\left(1\right)} \to {\left({\det({A})}{1_{{{n} \cup \{{n}\}}}}\right)\left(u\right)} = {\operatorname{if}\;{u\left(0\right)} = {u\left(1\right)}\;\operatorname{then}\;\det({A})\;\operatorname{else}\;0_{{K}}}\);
proof from hu, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hRowDeterminantIn (2 steps)
statement: u 0 = u 1 → matrix_left_scalar K mul (ordsucc n) (ordsucc n) (matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A) (unit_matrix K add mul (ordsucc n)) u = if u 0 = u 1 then matrix_determinant K add mul (ordsucc n) A else ring_zero K add;

assume heq;
L273181
thus thesis by transitivity using ring_multiplicative_identity_specification from hu, heq, h_s24_t2_core_ring, hRowDeterminantIn;
formal
